title: Component Entity
text: Component Entity A Component Entity is a Development Object that represents data that is owned by a Component. It is part of the Component’s structure and is maintained as part of the Component, although it may reference and inherit from a Modeled Entity. A Component Entity that inherits from a Modeled Entity is known as a derived entity . Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: ent Main Development Object? No Part of: Component , Component Entity, Derived Component Entity Contains: Component Entity, Derived Component Entity , Component Field , Label , Property , Code Container Generalization: Entity Specializations: Derived Component Entity Compilation Output: — URI format: cpt: ComponentName /ent: EntityName Specialization Component Entity specializes Development Object and Entity in the following ways: It has a Component or a Component Entity as parent. It can contain other Component Entities. It is created and maintained as part of the Component. Properties Properties defining the size, position, and repetition of object frame in the layout of Form and Report components: Left (xpos) Top (ypos) Width (xsize) Height (ysize) Horizontal Repetition Vertical Repetition Scrollbar Border Index Color Was this topic helpful?
